UserConfig.title: User Database Configurations
UserConfig.description: User specific configurations, such as linked Spreadsheet ID and preferences.

spreadsheetId.description: The linked Google Spreadsheet ID for this school data

isAutoSyncEnabled.description: Whether real-time background auto sync is enabled

updatedAt.description: The last time config was updated

AcademicState.title: Full Academic Database State
AcademicState.description: Stores all entities (classes, students, attendance, schedules) in a single document for cross-device cloud sync redundancy

/userConfigs/{userId}.description: Stores user database configurations linked to their account for cross-device synchronization

/academicData/{userId}.description: The backup and sync repository for all school dataset elements under the user's Google Account database
